_instructions: Add your projects here. Each project should showcase your work.

projects.title: AI-Powered Customer Support Automation Platform
projects.description: Designed full system architecture independently: Flask/FastAPI service layer with RESTful endpoints, LLM-driven intent classification, a RAG layer using FAISS embeddings over the support knowledge base, a PostgreSQL and SQLAlchemy-backed SQL generation engine, and a human escalation fallback for low-confidence classifications. Automated approximately 60% of inbound ticket volume, reducing average wait time by 40%. Awarded 3rd Prize at the Altice USA Hackathon; referenced internally as a model for AI-driven support automation.

projects.title: Predictive Campaign Intelligence System
projects.description: Designed EDA pipeline across 45,000 customer records, feature engineering from transactional signals, model selection, and a SHAP interpretability layer for non-technical stakeholders. Final architecture: XGBoost and Random Forest ensemble (ROC-AUC: 0.72). Dashboard adopted by marketing leadership, improving conversion rate predictions by 18%.
